meaning: n.四人用四十张纸牌玩的牌戏,四对方舞,四对方舞曲
examples: Shall we try another figure of the Lobster Quadrille?
The young man looked, bowed in obedience, and then went to Teresa, and invited her to dance in a quadrille directed by the counts daughter.
It was as formal and as convention-bound as an eighteenth-century quadrille.
